objective: Prove whether the current route universe can produce a real home-to-home 2026 Boise Trails Challenge plan under the user's current p90 door-to-door bounds.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.objective_requirement: Completion plan is a set of home-to-home field days.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.current_evidence: field-day-completion-plan-2026-05-06 only packs current canonical field-menu loops and fails precheck; repaired field-day pack audit and joint field-day optimizer also fail under strict bounds and under a non-compliant Shingle 292-minute weekday override.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.objective_requirement: Each field day starts at home with one car, may drive between legal parking starts, and returns home.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.current_evidence: Current field-day planner models home drive and between-start drive for canonical menu loops; repaired probe candidates are not yet packed into field days with coordinates.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.objective_requirement: Every run loop starts and ends at the same legal parked car.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.current_evidence: Canonical menu/probe candidates are same-car loops; parking/access verification promoted Avimor and Dry Creek/Sweet Connie anchors; no direct lower Shingle shortcut was promoted.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.objective_requirement: Use only legal runnable graph edges.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.current_evidence: Connector policy and graph validation are in use; Shingle connector-gap audit rejected unproven shortcuts.
Segment-split and forced-anchor probes require ascent-direction validation.
Segment-split and forced-anchor probes report track validation passed.
Strict repaired universe covers 250/251; Shingle-exception universe covers 251/251 only as a non-compliant what-if.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.objective_requirement: Every field day stays within p90 personal daily bounds.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.current_evidence: Shingle 1656 exhaustive anchor probe tested 74 known anchors with 0 under-bound graph/track-valid rows; best source-verified route is 292 min p90 against a 260 min bound; wide joint optimizer still needs at least 43 field days / 37 weekdays in the non-compliant 292-minute Shingle scenario.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.objective_requirement: Minimize total p75 home-to-home time with stress, p90 risk, grade-adjusted miles, on-foot miles, field-day count, and parking risk as tie-breakers.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.current_evidence: Wide direct field-day optimizer fails under current bounds and under the non-compliant Shingle 292-minute what-if; p75 optimization over actual field days is blocked until a feasible field-day candidate universe exists.

requirements.name: current official segment target loaded
requirements.evidence: 251 official on-foot segments / 164.43 official miles from the 2026-05-04 official pull

requirements.name: every official segment represented in candidate coverage
every selected route is a home-to-home field day
requirements.evidence: 14 current atomic loops exceed the largest p90 daily bound, so the field-day solver precheck fails

requirements.name: same-car return-to-car route shape
requirements.evidence: current field-menu/probe candidates are same-car loops, but oversized loops must be split or redesigned before scheduling

requirements.name: legal runnable graph edges
requirements.evidence: public-road/runnable connector policy is encoded; Harlow/Spring parking is source-verified, but Shingle remains over the time bound

requirements.name: direction rules
requirements.evidence: segment split and forced-anchor probes are graph-validated, including ascent-direction validation

requirements.name: continuous GPX
requirements.evidence: p90-segment-split-probe and p90-forced-anchor-probe report track validation passed for probed rows

requirements.name: fits p90 personal daily bounds
requirements.evidence: repaired bounded candidate universe covers 250/251; Shingle Creek 1656 remains over 260 min p90

requirements.name: packs into available field days
requirements.evidence: wide direct optimizer still fails: strict current bounds miss Shingle; Shingle 292-minute override requires at least 43 field days / 37 weekdays in generated candidates

requirements.name: availability sensitivity
requirements.evidence: 8-scenario sensitivity grid finds only 360 weekday / 360 weekend feasible for 251/251 in the generated route universe

requirements.name: optimized p75 home-to-home objective
requirements.evidence: optimization is blocked until all required segments have p90-feasible candidates and direct field-day optimization can produce a feasible schedule

metrics.shingle_anchor_exhaustive_best_field_rea: Dry Creek / Sweet Connie roadside parking

current_blockers.issue: No tested same-car candidate under the current 260-minute p90 bound.

best_known_rows.anchor: Dry Creek / Sweet Connie roadside parking

current_blockers.issue: resolved: source-verified Avimor parking anchors now produce strict under-260-minute rows.
Repaired selected loop universe does not pack into the available weekday/weekend profile.
current_blockers.evidence: With a non-compliant Shingle 292-minute weekday override, exact set cover selects 80 loops, including 27 weekday-only loops for 22 weekdays. The max-4 pack audit is infeasible.

current_blockers.issue: Direct field-day optimizer does not find a feasible schedule.
current_blockers.evidence: Wide direct optimizer now honors max_combo_size=4 and generates 31,962 field-day candidates for the non-compliant Shingle 292-minute scenario, but remains infeasible. Relaxed diagnostics need at least 43 field days or 37 weekdays with 9 weekends. Max-coverage mode covers 219/251 strict or 231/251 with the Shingle 292-minute what-if.

current_blockers.issue: Availability sensitivity requires much larger bounds for 100% in the generated universe.
current_blockers.evidence: In the tested grid, only 360 weekday / 360 weekend is feasible for 251/251; it uses 31 field days and 7,571 total p75 minutes.

current_blockers.issue: Closest near-miss still needs route/day packing work.
current_blockers.evidence: The 292 weekday / 360 weekend scenario covers 249/251 and misses Deer Point 1540 and Central Ridge Spur 1558. Both have individual generated field-day options, so the blocker is schedule opportunity cost rather than absent route candidates.

current_blockers.issue: Near-miss full coverage exceeds actual day counts.
current_blockers.evidence: Under 292/360 bounds, full coverage is infeasible with 22 weekdays and 9 weekends. With 9 weekends fixed it needs 24 weekdays; with 22 weekdays fixed it needs 10 weekends.

current_blockers.issue: Near-miss consolidation has one obvious generated-combo gap and one route-design target.
current_blockers.evidence: Two under-292 weekday pair consolidations exist but both share Shane's Trail, so simple pair consolidation saves at most one weekday. Upper 8th / Corrals / Sidewinder is the closest weekend-only day to convert, at p90 294.

current_blockers.issue: Relaxed inter-trailhead-drive sensitivity can complete 251/251 under 292/360 bounds.
current_blockers.evidence: With inter-trailhead drive limit 45 minutes and neighbor limit 40, the generated 292/360 field-day universe covers 251/251 in 31 field days using 22 weekdays and 9 weekends, total p75 7,684 minutes. This is not the current 260/180 personal-bounds proof and needs review for car-hop acceptability.

current_blockers.issue: Relaxed-drive completion plan is multi-start but not dominated by long between-start drives.
current_blockers.evidence: The relaxed-drive solution has 14 multi-start days and 76 total between-start drive minutes; only one day has more than 20 minutes between parked starts. It still needs human review for outing quality.

current_blockers.issue: Relaxed-drive p75-min draft is reviewable but not field-ready.
current_blockers.evidence: The draft field-day plan covers 251/251 with no day over 292/360 p90 bounds, all loop metadata validation passed, deterministic date assignment exists, and day-level GPX now validates. It still uses the relaxed 292/360 + 45-minute inter-trailhead-drive sensitivity and needs human review for outing quality/current conditions.

current_blockers.issue: Relaxed-drive calendar assignment passes narrow scheduling checks but is still not field-ready.
current_blockers.evidence: The deterministic date assignment covers 251/251 with 0 weekday/weekend type violations, 0 Lower Hulls even-day violations, and 0 p90 violations. Day-level GPX now validates, but this is not a recovery/rest optimizer and still depends on accepting the relaxed bounds.

current_blockers.issue: Relaxed-drive day-level GPX validation is resolved, but the relaxed profile is still not the active personal-bounds proof.
current_blockers.evidence: The day-level export now writes 31 dated GPX files with loop validation passed, day-track validation passed, and failed_day_count 0. This removes the GPX blocker for the relaxed 292/360 draft, but not the remaining bound/profile acceptance issue.

current_blockers.issue: Relaxed-drive draft does not match active personal p90 profile.
current_blockers.evidence: The validated relaxed draft uses 292/360 p90 bounds and 45-minute inter-trailhead drive, while the active private personal state is 260/180 and 20 minutes. The relaxed draft has 22 current-bound p90 violations and 1 inter-trailhead-drive violation, so it is not the active personal plan without an explicit profile change.

current_blockers.issue: Strict current profile has an executable max-coverage fallback, but it is not a completion plan.
current_blockers.evidence: Extracted strict-current-profile max coverage covers 219/251 segments and 122.45/164.43 official miles across 31 field days, with 0 Lower Hulls even-day violations. It misses 32 segments / 41.98 official miles, so it is useful for testing/adaptive execution but cannot satisfy the 100% objective.

current_blockers.issue: Strict current profile gaps are mostly schedule tradeoffs, not absent field-day candidates.
current_blockers.evidence: The strict-profile gap recovery audit classifies 31 of the 32 missing strict-profile segments as having at least one strict field-day candidate that was not selected; only Shingle Creek 1656 has no strict candidate under current bounds.

current_blockers.issue: Forcing strict-profile missing segments does not improve the strict 219/251 baseline.
current_blockers.evidence: The strict-profile swap audit forced each of the 32 missing segments into the 31-day max-coverage schedule. Ten are one-for-one swaps that keep 219 covered segments while dropping other covered segments; 21 reduce total covered segment count; Shingle Creek 1656 still has no strict field-day candidate.

next_required_decisions.result: Best current strict schedule covers 219/251 segments; Shingle 1656 has no under-bound anchor.
next_required_decisions.when_to_choose: Use this if the 260 weekday / 180 weekend p90 profile is non-negotiable.
next_required_decisions.next_work: Treat the plan as adaptive partial-coverage until route redesign or field calibration changes the Shingle/time evidence.

next_required_decisions.result: Not enough by itself. The non-compliant Shingle-292 scenario still fails field-day packing and needs at least 43 field days or 37 weekdays with 9 weekends.
next_required_decisions.when_to_choose: Only useful as one ingredient if the rest of the schedule is also relaxed or redesigned.
next_required_decisions.next_work: Continue route consolidation around weekday-only pressure.

next_required_decisions.result: Existing draft covers 251/251 in 31 days with 7684 p75 minutes, but violates current strict bounds on 22 days.
next_required_decisions.when_to_choose: Use this if 6-hour weekends and the wider inter-start drive allowance are realistic enough for the challenge.
next_required_decisions.next_work: Promote this profile into the active personal state, then rerun calendar/GPX/field-packet generation from that canonical profile.

next_required_decisions.result: Current best Shingle row is 292 p90, 32 minutes over the active bound.
next_required_decisions.when_to_choose: Use this if the profile should stay strict but Shingle may be faster in real life than modeled.
next_required_decisions.next_work: Field-test or manually validate a shorter legal Shingle connector/return; do not mark complete without new evidence.

recommended_next_step: Ask the user to choose whether the active profile remains strict or whether to promote the 292 weekday / 360 weekend / 45-minute inter-start-drive profile for the 2026 completion plan.
